title: Persona 4 Golden Deep Dark BGM
description: Adds a creepy track from P4G that plays specifically in the Deep Dark.
body:
The Deep Dark is a creepy biome that's filled with danger, and Persona 4 Golden also has creepy atmospheres. Want to combine them? Add this pack to have "Who's There?" from the P4G soundtrack play when you enter the Deep Dark. Supports music toasts in English US.

Song used:
